steps.title: Identify the passage structure
steps.content: The passage moves from a general principle—the definition of extinct languages—to a specific illustration using Umbrian. This is a definition-then-example structure that requires a transition signaling illustration.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: For example, introduces a specific illustration of the general principle—Umbrian demonstrates the definition by being a language once widely spoken yet no longer in use. The other choices fail because they signal consequence, concession, or conclusion rather than illustration. That matches choice C — C is correct.
